columns.name: rabNr

columns.description: Sequential number within the discount line

columns.name: rabFknrTil
columns.description: Reference number of the ending foreign entity or object

columns.name: rabGruppe
columns.description: Code for group (likely a common attribute or category)

columns.name: rabPros2

columns.name: rabFradato2

columns.name: rabTildato2
columns.description: End date of the second effective period for discount provisions

columns.name: rabMerknad
columns.description: Comment or remark about the discount line

columns.name: brukerid

columns.name: tidspunkt
